channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump touts Iran agreement to wrap up G7 summit in France
item.description: President Trump defended the agreement reached by the U.S. and Iran at a press conference to close out the G7 summit in France.

item.title: WATCH: 'Devil Wears Prada' franchise surpasses $1 billion globally
item.description: The sequel earned $676 million worldwide, bringing the franchise's total box office past $1 billion nearly two decades after the original.

item.title: Edwards Air Force Base identifies eight victims killed in B-52 crash
item.description: The eight individuals who died in a B-52 Stratofortress bomber crash this week have been named by authorities.

item.title: WATCH: Messi's stellar performance and Kansas town embraces Team Algeria
item.description: ABC News' Lara Spencer highlights the growing connection between a Kansas college town and a North African soccer team.
